caption: A woman with blonde hair tied back, wearing a white short-sleeved t-shirt and matching white trousers, walks through a clinical or office environment. The setting features grey carpeting, white walls, and a hallway. In the beginning, she walks past a set of dark grey or black lockers lining the wall. As she continues moving forward, she passes through a doorway and enters a bright hallway with white walls and flooring. The camera follows her from behind as she strides forward. No other people are visible in the scene, and there is no on-screen text or logos. The progression of the frames shows her continuous movement from the locker area into the corridor, maintaining a steady pace throughout the sequence.
